business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

positives: Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
16 years in business with consistent current management
concerns: Plumbing and electrical systems are original from 2005 (only HVAC replaced in 2020)
Building is not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
No quality control / quality assurance program
OSHA citations issued in the past 3 years
No cyber liability protections in place
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Three-year loss history: 11 claims in 2024 (Travelers), 3 claims in 2023 (Markel), and 6 claims in 2022 (Zurich, with cancellation).

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas. Operations include 4 hotels, 3 restaurants, and 1 corporate office across Austin, San Antonio, and Fredericksburg, TX. 285 full-time and 165 part-time employees. Hours of operation Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place; written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors; Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) maintained; fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring; 24-hour doorperson/security on premises; all locations sprinklered (though not fully per NFPA 13/13R). No formal quality control/quality assurance program. OSHA citations received within past 3 years.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: 2024 - Travelers Companies - Premium $686,236.25 - 11 claims - No cancellation. 2023 - Markel Corporation - Premium $619,820.26 - 3 claims - No cancellation. 2022 - Zurich Insurance Group - Premium $607,294.45 - 6 claims - Cancellation: Yes.
